_comment: Source of truth for the component library page. Files in dist/ are auto-discovered; this file adds the human bits (name, description, usage, docs). 'usage' is the full per-page snippet using the site-wide loader (pazUse) — the loader lives in the Webflow global footer and pulls each component from the CDN at its registry version, auto-loading CSS where needed. Add an entry keyed by the component's file basename. Omit an entry and the component still appears with embed tags only. Set hidden:true to suppress (e.g. stubs).

tabs.name: Tabs
tabs.description: Accessible tabbed panels, matched by ORDER — the Nth .paz-tab button shows the Nth .paz-tab-panel, so no ids or data attributes to maintain. First tab opens by default (or mark one with data-paz-default). Arrow keys move between tabs (Home/End jump to ends); panels fade in. Style everything yourself — the script only toggles an is-active class on the active tab + panel.
tabs.usage:
Plans Claims
Plans content…
Claims content…

modal.name: Modal
modal.description: Accessible modal engine. Auto-injects the close button (no need to add one per modal), closes on overlay click, Esc, or any [data-paz-modal-close]. Open via a data attribute or PazModal.open('id').
modal.usage: Your content here…

carousel.name: Carousel
carousel.description: Touch-enabled slider with autoplay, infinite loop, dots, and responsive breakpoints. Call initSlider(wrapEl, config) once per carousel — pass it as the pazUse callback so it runs after the script loads.
carousel.usage:
…
…
…

searchbar.name: CMS Searchbar
searchbar.description: Client-side search over a Webflow CMS collection. Fetches once, caches in localStorage, filters in-browser. Enter is blocked so Webflow's search page never hijacks it.

glossary.name: Glossary Renderer
glossary.description: Renders a CMS collection as an A–Z accordion glossary, with a built-in loading spinner that clears itself when content arrives.
glossary.dependsOn: Requires the CMS Searchbar script — load it first (nest pazUse) so WebflowCMS exists.
